title: AN ACT DEFINING THE BOUNDARIES OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF HAGONOY, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1098 / 55 OG No. 35, 2860 (April 20, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2094, March 03, 1959 ]

AN ACT DEFINING THE BOUNDARIES OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF HAGONOY, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The boundaries of the Municipality of Hagonoy, Province of Davao, shall be, on the north, an imaginary line cutting the Digos-Malalag-Makar National Road at Km. 311, running due west from the shoreline of the Davao Gulf up to an imaginary north-south line with longitude 125Â° 14' E., thence due south along this line to its intersection with an imaginary line running due west from the shoreline of the Davao Gulf and cutting the Digos-Malalag-Makar National Road at Km. 318.1, so that the territory of said municipality shall include the barrios of Kibuaya, Upper Sacub, Lower Sacub, Maliit-Digos, La Union, Malabang, Tulogan, Malinao, Guihing, Pawa, Hagonoy, Balutakay, Leling, and Sinayawan, and the sitos of Quezon and Polopolo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, March 3, 1959.
